behaviors.name: GetProfilesByUser
behaviors.description: Returns all profiles a user has access to, optionally filtered by customerId and name. Many-to-many via ProfileUserMapping. Used at login and in profile picker UI.
behaviors.signature: IReadOnlyCollection<Profile> GetProfilesbyUserId(int userId, int? customerId, string filter, bool includeSystemProfile, bool includeCustomer)

behaviors.name: CanUserAccessProfile
behaviors.description: Returns true if a ProfileUserMapping exists for (profileId, userId). Used as guard before UpdateCurrentProfileByUser.

behaviors.name: DoesProfileHaveRole
behaviors.description: Core capability gate. Checks ProfileRoleMappings for (profileId, roleName). Called from address service, broadcast, voice, e-Boks, map, data import, search — virtually every domain operation that has a capability toggle.

behaviors.name: UpdateCurrentProfileByUser
behaviors.description: Persists profile switch to DB (User.CurrentProfileId). Guards: profile must not be null, user must not be null, CanUserAccessProfile must return true. Updates User.DateLastUpdatedUtc. Cache invalidated.

behaviors.name: GetAddressRestrictionForProfile
behaviors.description: Returns the correct IAddressRestriction based on profile roles. Priority: profileId==0 OR HaveNoSendRestrictions → NoAddressRestriction; UseMunicipalityPolList → MunicipalityPositiveListAddressRestriction; else → PositiveListAddressRestriction. This is the main enforcement point of profile-level geographic access control.
behaviors.known_issue: profileId==0 returns NoAddressRestriction — bypasses all restrictions for uninitialised sessions

behaviors.name: AddProfileAccessToUser / DeleteUserProfileMappings
behaviors.description: Admin operations. Grant or revoke user access to one or more profiles. Invalidates ProfileRolesByProfile cache.

behaviors.name: GetApiKeys / Profile API key management
behaviors.description: Retrieve, create, delete API keys scoped to a profile. External integrations use these to act as a specific profile.

behaviors.name: NightTimeDetector.IsNightForProfile
behaviors.description: Determines whether it is 'night' for a profile based on Profile.TimeZoneId. Used to suppress or delay outbound messages.

behaviors.name: GetLatestPositiveList / GetLatestMunicipalityList
behaviors.description: Retrieve address restriction lists uploaded for a profile. Drives PositiveListAddressRestriction and MunicipalityPositiveListAddressRestriction.

behaviors.name: InsertRoleMappingsByRoleGroup
behaviors.description: Bulk-assign all roles from a ProfileRoleGroup to a profile. Used when Profile.RoleGroupId is set. Skips roles already assigned.
